headline: Johnson Controls Gains Shareholder Backing For Buybacks Dividend And Growth Flexibility
summary: Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) shareholders recently approved all resolutions at the Annual General Meeting. Investors backed board elections, auditor ratification, and authorizations for company and subsidiary share repurchases. The AGM also approved the potential issuance of up to 20% of existing share capital for future capital raising needs. Johnson Controls International, a global provider of building products, technologies, and integrated solutions, operates at the...
